message:
Command `MCU_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu"
WRAPPER_RUN="$MCU_DIR/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
DRT_ODB="$WRAPPER_RUN/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb"

# Write the inspection script
cat > /tmp/inspect_vddio.tcl << 'EOF'
read_db /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run/67-openroad-repairantennas/1-openroad-diodeinsertion/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper.odb
foreach net_name {VDDIO VSSIO VCCD VSSD} {
    set net [odb::dbNet_find [ord::get_db_block] $net_name]
    if { $net == "NULL" } {
        puts "Net $net_name: not found"
        continue
    }
    set bterms [$net getBTerms]
    puts "Net $net_name: [llength $bterms] bterms"
    foreach bterm $bterms {
        set bpins [$bterm getBPins]
        puts "  bterm [$bterm getName]: [llength $bpins] bpins"
    }
}
EOF

echo "=== Running OpenROAD to inspect VDDIO ==="
openroad -no_init -exit /tmp/inspect_vddio.tcl 2>&1 | grep -v "^Reading\|^OpenROAD\|^Copyright\|^$\|^License\|^This" | head -20` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash
